categories.description: Hooks that highlight a mistake or a potential loss.
hooks: Stop wasting your mornings on other people's priorities.
Your comfort zone is a slow-motion suicide.
The reason you're burnt out isn't work—it's your lack of boundaries.
99% of people are doing 'deep work' completely wrong.
You're not lazy; you're just overstimulated.

categories.description: Hooks that challenge the viewer's identity or present a new one.
hooks: The person you want to become doesn't have your current habits.
How a Stoic handles a toxic workplace.
The productivity system of the top 0.1%.
Stop acting like you have 1,000 years to live.
MindFrame Rule #1: Protect your attention like your life depends on it.

categories.description: Hooks that pose a question or tease an unknown fact.
hooks: The hidden cost of 'one more video'.
Why your brain craves distraction (and how to fix it).
The dark side of 'hustle culture' nobody talks about.
One habit that will make you unrecognizable in 6 months.
The 'Dopamine Detox' secret that actually works.

categories.description: Hooks that go against conventional wisdom.
hooks: Consistency is overrated. Intensity is what matters.
Stop reading books. Start implementing them.
Your 'to-do' list is actually a 'distraction' list.
The best way to get more done is to do less.
Motivation is a myth. Only systems remain.
